arguments.command: which llvm-symbolizer addr2line llvm-addr2line 2>/dev/null; apt list --installed 2>/dev/null | grep -E 'llvm|binutils' | head -5

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.command:
# Try downloading debug symbols from Microsoft symbol server using BuildId
# BuildId: 4ca7e2f19b3d605847a1c8e3f5b7d9a2c4e6f801
BUILDID="4ca7e2f19b3d605847a1c8e3f5b7d9a2c4e6f801"

# Try the ELF buildid format
echo "=== Trying libcoreclr.so with elf-buildid ==="
curl -sS -L -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "https://msdl.microsoft.com/download/symbols/libcoreclr.so/elf-buildid-${BUILDID}/libcoreclr.so"
echo ""

echo "=== Trying _.debug with elf-buildid-sym ==="
curl -sS -L -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "https://msdl.microsoft.com/download/symbols/_.debug/elf-buildid-sym-${BUILDID}/_.debug"
echo ""

echo "=== Trying libcoreclr.so.dbg ==="
curl -sS -L -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "https://msdl.microsoft.com/download/symbols/libcoreclr.so.dbg/elf-buildid-sym-${BUILDID}/libcoreclr.so.dbg"
echo ""

echo "=== Trying dotnet symbol server ==="
curl -sS -L -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "https://symbols.nuget.org/download/symbols/libcoreclr.so/elf-buildid-${BUILDID}/libcoreclr.so"
echo ""
arguments.description: Download debug symbols from symbol server

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Download debug symbols from symbol server

data.reasoningText:
The tombstone shows a crash in a .NET Android app (`com.companyname.CoreClrApp`). The backtrace has several frames from `libcoreclr.so` with BuildId `4ca7e2f19b3d605847a1c8e3f5b7d9a2c4e6f801`. To symbolicate these frames, I need to:

1. Find the debug symbols for this specific build of `libcoreclr.so`
2. Use the BuildId to locate the symbols from Microsoft's symbol server
3. Use `llvm-symbolizer` or `addr2line` to resolve the addresses to function names


4. Construct the proper Microsoft symbol server URL for ELF binaries using the BuildId format

, then explore what debugging tools are available to retrieve the symbols.

arguments.command: which llvm-symbolizer addr2line llvm-addr2line 2>/dev/null; apt list --installed 2>/dev/null | grep -E 'llvm|binutils' | head -5
